reasoning: The base resolution price is 73.19 (the close on Friday, May 9, 2025, since May 11 is a Sunday). Analyst price targets (averaging around $86 pre-earnings) suggest there may still be upside, and momentum is firmly positive over the last week. This suggests that while cyclical momentum and an earnings beat offer short-term buoyancy, the medium-term recovery remains uncertain. Given these factors, I anchor near the statistical estimate of 0.56 for the short horizon (May 18). As the forecast horizon increases to June, August (post next earnings), and November, market noise and long-term uncertainties dominate, warranting a gradual reversion of the probabilities toward a coin-flip baseline (0.50).
